subject: Need to help for adding new contact
content: I'm trying to add a new contact to my account but the save button doesn't seem to respond. Could someone walk me through the correct steps?
response: Looked into the contact-save issue — a validation error on the phone field was silently blocking the save button. Deployed a fix; please try adding the contact again and let us know if it saves correctly.

subject: I Want to know payment method
content: I'd like to know which payment methods are currently supported and whether I can update my billing details before my next invoice.
response: Shared the list of currently supported payment methods along with a link to update billing details. Following up to confirm everything looks correct before closing.

subject: Cannot access my account
content: I keep getting an 'invalid credentials' error when logging in, even after resetting my password twice. I need access restored as soon as possible.
response: Reset the account password and sent a new secure login link. Monitoring the account for further sign-in attempts to confirm access has been restored.

subject: Product shipment delay
content: My order was supposed to arrive last week but tracking hasn't updated since it left the warehouse. This has been resolved after checking with the courier.
response: Followed up with the courier and confirmed the package was delivered on 19/07. Ticket closed as resolved.

subject: Billing discrepancy
content: There's a charge on my latest invoice that doesn't match my subscription plan. Could you review it and confirm the correct amount?
response: Reviewing the invoice with billing to confirm which subscription tier applies to the disputed charge. Will update once the discrepancy is confirmed or corrected.

subject: Website error on checkout
content: The checkout page throws a 500 error whenever I try to apply a discount code. I was able to complete the purchase after removing the code, but the bug should still be fixed.
response: Identified a null-pointer error triggered by expired discount codes and pushed a hotfix to the checkout service. Verifying the fix holds before closing the ticket.

subject: Missing order item
content: My package arrived but one of the items listed on the packing slip was missing from the box. Please advise on next steps for a replacement or refund.
response: Confirmed the missing item with the warehouse team and a replacement is being shipped out. Will update with tracking details once it ships.

subject: Email notifications not received
content: I stopped receiving email notifications for ticket updates about a week ago. Turned out my notification settings had been reset; re-enabling them fixed the issue.
response: Found that email notifications had been disabled during a settings reset; re-enabled them and confirmed delivery is working again. Ticket closed.

subject: Application crashing on startup
content: The desktop app crashes immediately after the splash screen on the latest update. Reinstalling didn't help. Attaching the crash log for reference.
response: Traced the startup crash to a bad dependency introduced in the latest build and shipped a patched release. Awaiting confirmation the crash no longer occurs.

subject: Application crashing on startup
content: Same crash-on-startup issue as reported previously, now happening on a second machine as well. Sharing an updated crash log.
response: Applied the same fix released for ticket #09 to the second machine; startup crash no longer reproduces on either device.

subject: Application crashing on startup
content: Following up on the earlier crash reports — the issue also occurs on the mobile version now. Attaching a screen recording of the crash.
response: Extended the startup-crash fix to the mobile build after reviewing the screen recording. Monitoring for further reports before closing.

subject: API rate limit errors
content: Our integration is hitting rate limit errors much sooner than expected during normal usage.
response: Reviewed the account's API usage and increased the rate limit tier; please monitor for further errors.

subject: Invoice PDF corrupted
content: The invoice PDF I downloaded won't open and shows a corrupted file error.
response: Regenerated the invoice PDF using the corrected template; the new file should open without issues.

subject: Push notifications delayed
content: Push notifications are arriving several hours late instead of in real time.
response: Restarted the notification queue service which had stalled and confirmed notifications are now real-time.

subject: Login page not loading
content: The login page shows a blank white screen on both Chrome and Firefox.
response: Identified a broken script reference causing the blank page and corrected it; please clear your cache and retry.

subject: Two-factor authentication issue
content: I'm not receiving the OTP code on my phone when trying to log in with 2FA enabled.
response: Reset the 2FA configuration on the account and resent a test code; please confirm delivery.

subject: Cannot cancel subscription
content: I've tried multiple times to cancel my subscription from the account settings page but it keeps failing.
response: Manually processed the cancellation request and confirmed no further charges will occur.

subject: Incorrect tax calculation
content: The tax amount shown at checkout doesn't match the rate listed for my region.
response: Corrected the tax rate table for the affected region and reprocessed the calculation; please verify the new total.

subject: Invoice PDF corrupted
content: The invoice PDF I downloaded won't open and shows a corrupted file error.
response: Regenerated the invoice PDF using the corrected template; the new file should open without issues.

subject: Dashboard loading slowly
content: The main dashboard takes over 30 seconds to load since the last update, making it hard to work efficiently.
response: Identified an unoptimized query causing the slowdown and added proper indexing; load times should now be normal.

subject: Export to CSV fails
content: Exporting my report to CSV results in an empty file every time I try.
response: Fixed a bug in the export module that was truncating the file stream; export should now work correctly.

subject: Export to CSV fails
content: Exporting my report to CSV results in an empty file every time I try.
response: Fixed a bug in the export module that was truncating the file stream; export should now work correctly.

subject: Cannot merge duplicate contacts
content: There's no option in the interface to merge two duplicate contact entries.
response: Added a merge contacts feature to the latest release; please check the contacts page for the new option.

subject: Mobile app freezing
content: The mobile app freezes whenever I try to open the notifications tab.
response: Identified a memory leak in the notifications view and shipped a fix in the latest app update.

subject: Duplicate charge on account
content: I was charged twice for the same subscription renewal this month.
response: Confirmed the duplicate charge and processed a refund for the extra transaction; refund should appear within 5 business days.

subject: Cannot change profile picture
content: The upload button for changing my profile picture doesn't respond when clicked.
response: Resolved a frontend event binding issue preventing the upload button from working; please try again.

subject: Wrong shipping address used
content: My last order was shipped to an old address even though I updated it in my profile.
response: Updated the default shipping address in the system and flagged the order for redelivery to the correct address.

subject: Unable to upload attachment
content: Every time I try to attach a file larger than 5MB the upload just fails silently with no error message.
response: Increased the upload size limit and redeployed the file service; please retry the upload and confirm.

subject: Cannot reopen closed ticket

response: Enabled ticket reopening for closed tickets within 30 days and reopened the ticket you flagged.

response: Enabled the ticket-merge feature for your account and merged the duplicate tickets as requested.
